reason: Chain-of-thought (CoT) is the most effective skill for improving reasoning and accuracy on trivia and logic questions. Unlocking it now will maximize my chances of success in future chambers.
Unlocking 'pe_plan' provides a planning phase and a reflection call, which will significantly improve my accuracy and safety for higher-level questions.

Unlocking the Reflection skill is a high-priority investment. By adding a dedicated reflection step, I significantly reduce the risk of losing HP to avoidable errors and increase the consistency of XP gains. This safety net is particularly valuable as I approach higher-level questions.
Unlocking the context skill to ensure I have access to previous Q&A pairs, which may be relevant for future challenges or meta-puzzles in the "Dungeon of Self."
